title: The Wedding Trap Is Set
description: On pages 9–14, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Capone Bege, Big Mom, Bege as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: OK, now please do the rest yourself!!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Hey!! Someone stop Bege and his crew!!!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 13 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
